$comment: cpp: generate a C++ compilation unit for a task. First PLAN the APIs/headers needed, then look those up in cppref (reference lookup - the model picks what to retrieve), generate grounded in them, syntax-check with cl (cl_check), and repair UP TO TWICE (grounded in the MSVC error docs). Unrolled, lints clean, terminates.
summary: Generate C++ (C++17, MSVC) for a focused task: plan the APIs, ground on cppreference, compile-check with cl, repair up to twice.
